description.content:
MediSys Medical Appointment Booking System API

## Authentication Flow
1. **Register** a new account
2. **Confirm Email** (check server logs for confirmation link)
3. **Login** — access & refresh tokens auto-save to collection variables
4. Call any authenticated endpoint

Access token expires in **60 min**. Use **Refresh Token** to get a new one.

Set `base_url` collection variable (default: http://localhost:8000)
